description: Interactive Scotland map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.
intro: Back to freshwater with Scotland, the fifth unlockable area in Creatures of the Deep. A wide variety of common fish, several rare ones and relatively abundant epic species. No major surprises for an experienced angler. Prepare your fishing session by clicking on a fish in the side menu to see the details.
name: Scotland
title: Scotland map
